top_signals.title: Trump claims Iran war settled 'subject to finalization,' expects signing in 'next few days'
top_signals.summary: Hours earlier, Trump warned that the U.S. would attack Iran "VERY HARD TONIGHT" and soon take over Iran's oil infrastructure assets, including Kharg Island.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oracle mitigates PeopleSoft zero-day exploited in data theft attacks
top_signals.summary: Oracle is warning about a critical PeopleSoft Suite zero-day vulnerability tracked as CVE-2026-35273 that allows unauthenticated remote code execution, with the flaw actively exploited in ShinyHunter data theft attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Meta reportedly begins dismantling $2 billion Manus deal on Beijing's orders
top_signals.summary: Meta has reportedly begun dismantling its acquisition of Manus, moving to comply with Beijing's unprecedented order to hand back the Chinese-founded AI startup.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Baroness Hogg has been reappointed as a non-executive member of the Office for Budget Responsibility.
top_signals.summary: Baroness Hogg has been reappointed as a non-executive member of the Office for Budget Responsibility.

top_signals.title: Heavy Police Presence in Jakarta as Students Protest Prabowo
top_signals.summary: Indonesian authorities deployed thousands of police and soldiers as students gathered in the capital, angry at the rising cost of living and calling on President Prabowo Subianto to rein in big-ticket spending.

top_signals.title: Consumption tax cut on groceries could do more harm than good
top_signals.summary: It could lead to less confidence in Japan's fiscal state, a weaker yen, higher rates and slower economic growth.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: A Chinese start-up's unfolding dilemma exposes cracks in Beijing's tech funding machine
top_signals.summary: While the U.S. channels support to tech winners indirectly via incentives, Chinese governments at every level take direct equity stakes.

top_signals.title: Strong Job Growth Weakens Stocks - WSJ
top_signals.summary: Strong Job Growth Weakens Stocks  WSJ
